items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 24 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Industrial Software Leaders Build Secure, Autonomous AI Engineers With NVIDIA NemoClaw」、「NVIDIA GTC Berlin Registration Is Now Open」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
